message:
refactor(sync/rwlock): migrate RwLock internal state from std::sync::Mutex to parking_lot

Complete the parking_lot migration for the RwLock primitive, consistent
with the Notify, Mutex, and Semaphore migrations in prior commits.

- Replace StdMutex<State> with parking_lot::Mutex<State>
- Remove .lock().expect("rwlock state poisoned") boilerplate from
  try_read(), try_write(), release_reader_on_error(), and related paths
- Sync .beads/issues.jsonl with latest state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
